message:
fix(fsfs): add Eq derives and Reranked phase support across crates

Add Eq derives to appropriate structs in alien_recommendations.rs and
cli_e2e.rs to satisfy clippy derive_partial_eq_without_eq warnings.
Add allow attributes for structs with f64 fields that cannot implement Eq.

Add Reranked variant handling to examples, tests, and fusion collectors
to support the new three-phase search pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
